title: Styphelia rufa

This plant is typically classified as a shrub or small tree, and its classification is further broken down into the genus Styphelia and the species rufa. The classification of Styphelia rufa is also aligned with the APG III system, which is a widely accepted system for plant classification. The Ericaceae family to which Styphelia rufa belongs is often referred to as the heath or heather family due to the presence of similar species.
